data.input: Process new vendor invoice emails from Gmail. Extract invoice details, validate them against the Google Sheet tabs named vendors, purchase_orders, and invoice_reviews, apply the uploaded invoice approval policy, write a review row to invoice_reviews, and use Human-in-the-Loop before sending dispute emails or marking high-value invoices ready for payment.
data.instructions: Use the SOP in duvo/assignment_sop.md. Use duvo/invoice_approval_policy.md for status and risk routing. Use duvo/dispute_email_style.md for vendor dispute drafts. Never send a vendor dispute email without human approval. Never mark invoices over EUR 5000 ready for payment without human approval.
